assertions.description: Multiple sub-Hz bandpass filter stages correctly detected using 43k resistors with 4.7uF caps (~0.79 Hz) for the EHZ/EHE/EHN seismic signal paths
VIN and VCC decoupling correctly analyzed: VIN has 3 caps (45uF total), VCC has 8 caps (60.9uF total)

INCORRECT: Y1 SG-8002CA 8M-PCML0 is an active oscillator (SG-8002CA series by Epson), not a passive crystal. The analyzer incorrectly identified 12 power decoupling capacitors on D+3V3 rail as crystal load caps, resulting in a nonsensical effective_load_pF=50003.0. Active oscillators have no external load caps.

INCORRECT: U1 TPS5430DDA detected as switching regulator with input_rail=VCC but no output_rail identified. The TPS5430DDA in this design generates the GNDA analog reference rail through an unusual topology (PH->L1->GNDA), and its feedback divider R4/R3 is detected as a separate voltage_divider but not linked to U1
